data.title: KBRA assigns ratings to $298.7M mortgage-backed notes from OBX 2025-NQM17 Trust, with 541 residential mortgages, mostly FRMs.
data.description: In New York, KBRA has given preliminary ratings to eight classes of mortgage-backed notes from OBX 2025-NQM17 Trust, a non-prime RMBS transaction worth $298.7 million. The collateral includes 541 residential mortgages, consisting of 91.9% fixed-rate mortgages (FRMs) and 8.1% hybrid adjustable-rate mortgages (ARMs). The loans are primarily non-qualified mortgages (Non-QM; 48.4%) or exempt (41.7%) from the standards.

data.title: Owens Corning announces $0.69 per common share quarterly dividend, payable on November 6, 2025.
data.description: In Toledo, Ohio, Owens Corning (NYSE: OC) disclosed a quarterly cash dividend of $0.69 per common share. Shareholders of record as of October 20, 2025, will receive the dividend on November 6, 2025. The decision on future dividends will be contingent upon the company's earnings, financial standing, cash needs, and outlook, at the Board of Directors' discretion. Owens Corning is a prominent company with a long-standing history.

data.title: Capgemini issues €4.0 billion bond.
data.description: This announcement is not to be shared or distributed in the United States, Canada, Australia, or Japan.

data.title: Qnity Electronics aims to accelerate growth, focusing on semiconductor solutions, with two-thirds of its portfolio tied to semiconductors. Total addressable market to exceed expectations.
data.description: Qnity has outlined its ambitious growth objectives as a top technology solutions provider in the semiconductor industry. Approximately 66% of its portfolio is specifically focused on semiconductors, encompassing activities such as chip production, advanced packaging, and thermal management. The total addressable market for these services is projected to surpass a significant figure.

data.title: Capstone Copper resumes full operations at Mantoverde mine in Chile after motor failure, plans 5-day maintenance in September.
data.description: VANCOUVER, BC - Capstone Copper Corp. reports that sulphide copper production at the Mantoverde mine in Chile has resumed normal operations after a motor failure in the ball mill. Following the interruption announced on August 31st, the mine is now operating at full capacity. The company anticipates a five-day maintenance period at the end of September. Capstone Copper Corp. is listed on the Toronto Stock Exchange (TSX: CS) and the Australian Securities Exchange (ASX: CSC).

data.title: Chimera Corp declares $0.37 dividend per common share for Q3 2025, payable on Oct 31 to stockholders of record on Sep 30.
data.description: In New York, the Board of Directors of Chimera Investment Corporation has declared a third quarter cash dividend of $0.37 per common share. The dividend is set to be paid on October 31, 2025, to common stockholders who are recorded as of September 30, 2025. For those interested in buying the stock and still receiving the dividend, the ex-dividend date is also September 30, 2025. Chimera Investment Corporation is a publicly traded Real Estate Investment Trust (REIT) that aims to offer appealing risk-adjusted returns to its investors.
7.8 Magnitude Earthquake Strikes 127 Km East Of Petropavlovsk-Kamchatsky, Russia

data.title: Akima opened 35,000 sq ft office in Huntsville on Sept 10, expanding support for defense, aerospace, and tech sectors.
data.description: Akima, a prominent provider of mission-centric solutions to the federal government, marked the inauguration of its latest Huntsville office, spanning 35,000 square feet, in Herndon, Virginia on September 10, 2025. The ribbon-cutting ceremony signifying this expansion highlights Akima's strategic commitment to long-term growth and strengthening its presence in the region.

data.title: NVIDIA's CEO reveals $5 billion investment in Intel, leading to INTC stock soaring with plans to build AI systems together.
data.description: NVIDIA Corp.'s CEO Jensen Huang disclosed that the company's investment of $5 billion and collaboration with Intel Corp. stemmed from almost a year of discussions. The stock of INTC experienced a sharp rise on Thursday following this announcement. The partnership aims to develop AI data center systems merging Intel's x86 processors with Nvidia's GPUs and networking products. The plan includes Nvidia becoming a major client of Intel. This partnership marks a significant step in advancing AI technology.

data.title: Weatherford International increased its credit facility to $1 billion, with $600 million revolver tranche and $400 million for letters of credit, enhancing liquidity to $1.5 billion.
data.description: Houston, September 18, 2025 - Weatherford International plc (NASDAQ: WFRD) has recently announced an increase in its credit facility by $280 million, reaching a total of $1 billion, effective immediately. The updated facility consists of a $600 million revolver tranche and $400 million designated for performance letters of credit. Additionally, an expanded accordion feature allows for lender commitments to potentially grow to $1.15 billion under specific conditions, while the maturity date has been extended from 2028 to 2030. With this development, the company's pro forma liquidity as of June 2025 has climbed to $1.5 billion, strengthening its financial position and backing its long-term strategic plans.

data.title: Cooper Standard appoints Soma Venkat, Ph.D., as Senior VP & Chief IT and AI Officer, effective Sep 15, 2025.्ऀ
data.description: On September 18, 2025, in Northville, Michigan, Cooper Standard revealed the promotion of Soma Venkat, Ph.D., to the position of senior vice president and chief information technology and AI officer as of September 15, 2025. Venkat will take charge of steering Cooper Standard's artificial intelligence strategies. The company is listed on NYSE under the ticker symbol CPS.

data.title: W. P. Carey raises quarterly dividend to $0.910 per share, annual rate $3.64. Payable on October 15, 2025.
data.description: In a recent announcement on September 18, 2025, W. P. Carey Inc. (NYSE: WPC) disclosed an update regarding its quarterly cash dividend. The company's Board of Directors approved a hike in the dividend to $0.910 per share for the quarter, translating to an annualized rate of $3.64 per share. Shareholders can anticipate this dividend payment on October 15...

data.title: PG&E Foundation donates $1.12 million to 50+ local organizations and food banks in fight against food insecurity.
data.description: A generous charitable donation totaling $1.12 million is being provided by The PG&E Foundation in Oakland, California. The funding will aid over 50 local organizations, with a focus on supporting food banks and enhancing their emergency preparedness. In addition to this contribution, PG&E Corporation is also providing further support to ensure the efficiency and effectiveness of food banks in the region.

data.title: BOXABL and FG Merger II Corp. announced filing for merger; FGMC is a publicly traded SPAC.
data.description: Today, Boxabl Inc. ("BOXABL"), a company specializing in cutting-edge housing solutions, and FG Merger II Corp. disclosed their joint filing with the United States Securities and Exchange Commission. This collaboration involves FGMC, a special purpose acquisition company listed on Nasdaq under the tickers FGMC, FGMCR, and FGMCU. The announcement was made in Las Vegas and Itasca, Illinois on September 18, 2025. This move signifies a significant step in the companies' partnership and strategic development within the industry.

data.title: Cohen & Steers and Lincoln Property form a joint venture to own Cityline at Tenley in Washington, D.C. - Sept 18, 2025.
data.description: On September 18, 2025, Cohen & Steers (NYSE: CNS) revealed a collaboration where funds under the management of the Private Real Estate Group of Cohen & Steers and Lincoln Property Company have initiated a joint venture aimed at acquiring Cityline at Tenley. This retail center situates in Tenleytown, an upscale neighborhood.

Gold Prices Fell As The US Dollar Strengthened And The Federal Reserve Indicated Caution On Rate Cuts, Despite Year-To-Date Gains. Political And Legal Uncertainties At The Fed And Global Instability Continue To Boost Gold As A Safe Haven.

data.title: Seminole Hard Rock Tampa donates $100,000 to Hispanic community for Hispanic Heritage Month celebrations.
data.description: Throughout the month-long event entitled 'My Rhythm. My Flavor. ¡Mi Gente!' in Tampa, Florida, attendees can enjoy Latin-inspired menus, participate in lively Latin nights, and view a display of iconic memorabilia from famous Latin superstars. The celebration commenced on September 18, 2025. The event promises to offer a rich cultural experience with various activities and displays for visitors to enjoy.

data.title: Coinbase partners with DeFi, offering 10.8% yield on USDC holdings through Morpho lending on its app.
data.description: A popular cryptocurrency exchange has announced the integration of Morpho lending into its application. This new feature enables users of the stablecoin USDC to access decentralized finance (DeFi) yields reaching as high as 10.8%.

data.title: Korein Tillery wins $49.25M in antitrust case for NCAA baseball coaches, each coach receives $50k avg. payout.
data.description: A landmark class action lawsuit on behalf of NCAA Division I baseball coaches has resulted in a $49.25 million settlement, with individual coaches receiving an average payout of $50,000. Korein Tillery successfully obtained final court approval for the settlement in St. Louis on September 18, 2025. The agreement has been heralded for its significant compensation to the coaches involved.

data.title: Second poor job report challenges Trump's booming economy claim. Official fired after August's bad numbers. Latest data equally disappointing.
data.description: Following a poor employment report in August, the official responsible for the figures was dismissed by President Trump. The latest data for this month also revealed concerning statistics.
